note: Complete analysis of all models. T03a covered: core, projekt, arch_z, uzivatel (direct reading). T03b added: heslar, pian, pas, adb, oznameni, xml_generator (direct reading) + ORM patterns in the views. T03c added: dokument, historie, ez, xml_generator (abstract models). T03d added: komponenta, lokalita, nalez, dj, neidentakce, notifikace_projekty. Coverage gap closed — all 19 Django applications with models are now covered.
github_issues_crossref: GitHub Issues were not accessible without authentication. Bugs marked 'cannot verify'. Manual search recommended before creating issues.

core.SouborVazby.notes: Link table for files; the link types are defined by constants.

core.Soubor.notes: File model; contains antivirus check logic and thumbnail generation.

core.ProjektSekvence.notes: Sequence for generating project ident_cely. Accessed via the 'urgent' database.

core.Permissions.notes: Permissions table for various record types.

projekt.Projekt.notes: The main domain model. Contains two geometry fields (WGS84 + S-JTSK). The workflow state is modeled via a SmallIntegerField with CHOICES.

arch_z.ArcheologickyZaznam.notes: Good compound indexing. The model covers both lokality and akce (the discriminating field typ_zaznamu). The save() method does an extra SELECT on every save (see n_plus_one_candidates NP1-008).

uzivatel.User.notes: WARNING: Import of cached_property from distlib.util (a packaging library) instead of functools or django.utils.functional — see BUG-003 in bugs.md.

uzivatel.NotificationsLog.notes: Notifications log without an index on created_at — potentially slow time-based queries.

potential_missing_indexes: nazev_heslare FK without an explicit db_index
heslar.Heslar.notes: Central controlled-vocabulary table. Used with limit_choices_to in many FKs; an explicit index on nazev_heslare is missing.

heslar.RuianKatastr.notes: Contains geometry fields (definicni_bod, hranice). A large table (~13,000 cadastres).

pian.Pian.notes: Contains two geometry fields (WGS84 + S-JTSK). The pristupnost property does an N+1 query on every access.

pian.Kladyzm.notes: The spatial index the_geom depends on the database configuration.

pas.SamostatnyNalez.notes: The model has few db_index=True on its FK fields — for a table with probably thousands of records this is a problem for filtering.

adb.Adb.notes: Uses FieldTracker from model_utils for change tracking — an alternative to the initial_ pattern.

oznameni.Oznamovatel.notes: A simple model without ORM problems.

potential_missing_indexes: nazev_heslare FK without db_index — critical, see BUG-005
heslar.Heslar.notes: nazev_heslare is filtered in limit_choices_to in dozens of FK fields across the application. The absence of an index causes a table scan on every form query.

heslar.HeslarHierarchie.notes: GOOD: __init__() correctly stores the initial values of the FK fields.

models._t03c_t03d_separator: --- T03c/T03d: models added as part of the coverage-gap analysis ---

dokument.Dokument.notes: The second most complex domain model (after Projekt). High fan-out (8 cross-app imports per dependency_graph). Contains eval(i) in set_permanent_ident_cely (see SEC-ORM-004). N+1 in check_pred_odeslanim (see NP1-015). GOOD: __init__() stores initial_let.

dokument.DokumentCast.notes: A CheckConstraint prevents simultaneous linking to both arch_z and projekt. GOOD: well-designed compound indexes. The initial_archeologicky_zaznam/initial_projekt properties do objects.get() on every access — extra SELECT (see NP1-017, NP1-018).

dokument.DokumentExtraData.notes: Extension data for 3D models. Contains two geometry fields (WGS84 + S-JTSK) and a CheckConstraint for the duveryhodnost range (0–100).

dokument.DokumentAutor.notes: M2M link table with ordering. unique_together: (dokument, autor) and (dokument, poradi).

dokument.Tvar.notes: M2M link table of aerial shapes. unique_together: (dokument, tvar, poznamka). Ordered by tvar__razeni.

dokument.DokumentSekvence.notes: Sequence for generating document ident_cely. UniqueConstraint on (rada, region, rok). Uses the 'urgent' database.

dokument.Let.notes: Flight model for aerial archaeology. Inherits from ModelWithMetadata. save() checks for the existence of the container in Fedora.

historie.Historie.notes: Central audit log for the entire application. 42 change types (CHOICES) covering all domain entities. Well-designed compound indexes. save_record_deletion_record is a classmethod called from ModelWithMetadata.

historie.HistorieVazby.notes: An architecturally critical model — used as a OneToOne FK from Projekt, Dokument, ArcheologickyZaznam, SamostatnyNalez, Pian, ExterniZdroj, User. The navazany_objekt property uses a hasattr() chain to find the linked object.

ez.ExterniZdroj.notes: Bibliographic sources. Inherits from ModelWithMetadata. eval(i) in get_perm_ez_ident (see SEC-ORM-005). Missing db_index on stav and typ — filtering by state may be slow. N+1 in set_snapshots (see NP1-019).

ez.ExterniZdrojAutor.notes: M2M link table with ordering. unique_together: (externi_zdroj, autor), (externi_zdroj, poradi).

ez.ExterniZdrojEditor.notes: M2M link table with ordering. unique_together: (externi_zdroj, editor), (poradi, externi_zdroj).

ez.ExterniZdrojSekvence.notes: Singleton sequence for BIB-* identifiers. A CheckConstraint enforces id=1. Uses the 'urgent' database.

xml_generator.BaseAmcrModel.notes: Abstract base model for all AMČR models. Provides __str__() and the get_ident_cely_link property. Imported by 10+ applications.

xml_generator.ModelWithMetadata.notes: Abstract model with key architectural methods: save_metadata, record_deletion, record_ident_change, save_record_deletion_record. Manages the link to the Fedora Repository. record_ident_change contains cascading metadata saving via on_commit (visible form: 7 isinstance branches for different record types). check_if_task_queued() checks the Celery queue. Partially analyzed in NP1-014.

komponenta.KomponentaVazby.notes: Link table for components (typ_vazby: dokumentacni_jednotka or dokument_cast). Analogous to historie.HistorieVazby. navazany_objekt property with a hasattr() chain.

komponenta.Komponenta.notes: Inherits from BaseAmcrModel. The pocet_nalezu property does 2 COUNT queries (objekty + predmety) instead of one. get_absolute_url() follows 3–4 FK hops without select_related.

lokalita.Lokalita.notes: Extension of ArcheologickyZaznam for typ_zaznamu=lokalita. Custom PID management (IGSN). set_snapshots does katastry.all() + katastry.count() (two queries instead of one). get_by_ident_cely filters via the FK (archeologicky_zaznam__ident_cely).

nalez.NalezObjekt.notes: Find object linked to a component. Ordered by druh__razeni, specifikace__razeni. GOOD: db_index on the FK fields.

nalez.NalezPredmet.notes: BUG: __init_ defined with a single underscore instead of __init__ (line 116) — the custom init code (close_active_transaction_when_finished, active_transaction) never runs. See BUG-015.

dj.DokumentacniJednotka.notes: Inherits from BaseAmcrModel. A key model linking ArcheologickyZaznam with Komponenty and PIANs. Uses FieldTracker from model_utils. GOOD: __init__() stores initial_pian_id. The initial_pian property does objects.get() — extra SELECT, but with try/except DoesNotExist.

neidentakce.NeidentAkce.notes: Unidentified akce linked to DokumentCast. __init__() accesses self.dokument_cast.dokument — a potential extra query on instantiation.

notifikace_projekty.Pes.notes: Watchdog (hlídací pes) — a GenericForeignKey for tracking an arbitrary record. UniqueConstraint on (user, content_type, object_id). Missing db_index on the user FK — queries for 'my watchdogs' may be slow.

query_patterns.assessment: The total count is relatively low for the scope of the application. The views contain select_related, but the models themselves in properties and check_pred_* methods do not use prefetch.
Used mostly for complex PostGIS spatial queries. In core/utils.py the raw queries are parameterized. In the management command the queries are without parameters.
Parameterized extra() for ST_Z(geom) — safe, but deprecated since Django 4+.

n_plus_one_candidates.description: Iterates self.akce_set.all() without prefetch_related. For each akce it accesses akce.archeologicky_zaznam (another query). Typically 5–50 akce per project.
Calls self.akce_set.all() twice (once for len(), once for iteration). Inside the iteration it calls a.archeologicky_zaznam.check_pred_odeslanim() — cascading N+1.
Uses len(self.akce_set.all()) instead of .count() — needlessly loads all records into memory.
Iterates over samostatne_nalezy or akce without prefetch_related. Inside it accesses nested FKs (pristupnost).
Does a DB query self.historie.historie_set.order_by(...).first() on every access. Not cached.
Calls self.dokumentacni_jednotky_akce.all() twice and, for each DJ, iterates dj.komponenty.komponenty.all() — nested N+1. Calls doc_cast.dokument.check_pred_odeslanim() for each document part.
Nested loops: for each DJ it iterates the components, saving each component individually. Potentially N*M DB writes without bulk_update.
On every record save (where pk != None) it does a SELECT get(pk=self.pk) to detect a change of pristupnost. An unnecessary extra SELECT on every save() operation.
Iterates spoluprace_query and calls spoluprace.save() individually. Should be replaced with bulk_update().
Calls Group.objects.get() four times on every call of the method. Could be replaced with a single query using filter() or cached.
Iterates over dok_jednotky without select_related, accesses dok_jednotka.archeologicky_zaznam.pristupnost — double N+1. The property is not cached.

Extra SELECT get(pk=self.pk) on every record save to detect a change of pristupnost. The model has an initial_pristupnost property, but it is set AFTER the extra SELECT, not in __init__(). The pattern is incomplete — see BUG-004.
n_plus_one_candidates.note: T03a correction: severity lowered from Medium to Low — the number of samostatný nález records is typically smaller than the number of archaeological records.

n_plus_one_candidates.description: Triple-hop N+1: for each DJ it accesses dok_jednotka.archeologicky_zaznam.akce.projekt.organizace without select_related. Each of these accesses may trigger a separate DB query.
Two separate for-loops over self.soubory.soubory.all() without prefetch. The overall impact is low (only during deletion).
For 3D documents it accesses self.casti.all()[0].komponenty.komponenty.all()[0].obdobi and .areal without prefetch_related — cascading N+1 through DokumentCast → KomponentaVazby → Komponenta.
Iterates dokumentautor_set.order_by('poradi').all() and dokumentosoba_set.order_by().all() with nested .autor.vypis_cely / .osoba.vypis_cely — N+1 for each author/person.
Does ArcheologickyZaznam.objects.get(pk=...) on every access — extra SELECT. The same anti-pattern as NP1-008/BUG-004.
Does Projekt.objects.get(pk=...) on every access — extra SELECT.
Iterates externizdrojautor_set and externizdrojeditor_set with nested .autor.vypis_cely / .editor.vypis_cely — N+1.
Calls katastry.all() and then katastry.count() — a double query instead of one.

security_findings_orm.type: eval() on data from the DB
security_findings_orm.description: eval(i) is called on values obtained from the database (ident_cely segments). The correct replacement is int(i). Even though ident_cely is controlled data, eval() is bad practice. See BUG-001 in bugs.md.

security_findings_orm.type: eval() on data from the DB
security_findings_orm.description: The same pattern as SEC-ORM-001. See BUG-001.

security_findings_orm.type: eval() on data from the DB
security_findings_orm.description: The same pattern as SEC-ORM-001. See BUG-001.

security_findings_orm.type: eval() on data from the DB
security_findings_orm.description: eval(i) on ident_cely segments obtained from the DB. The same pattern as SEC-ORM-001. Replace with int(i). See BUG-001.

security_findings_orm.type: eval() on data from the DB
security_findings_orm.description: eval(i) on BIB-* ident_cely segments obtained from the DB. The same pattern as SEC-ORM-001. Replace with int(i). See BUG-001.

raw_sql_usage.reason: PostGIS spatial queries (ST_Distance, ST_DWithin) — legitimate use, parameterized
Management command for transforming geometries — SQL without parameters (an internal administrative command)
.extra(where=['ST_Z(geom) >= %s']) for the Z coordinate — deprecated since Django 4+

positive_findings: Indexing is mostly consistent — most FK fields have db_index=True
cached_property used for computationally expensive properties (Akce.vedouci)
CheckConstraint used for data integrity (akce_typ_check, samostatny_nalez_geom_check)
ExportModelOperationsMixin from django-prometheus for monitoring DB operations
Consistent pattern of set_*() methods for workflow state transitions
The 'urgent' database pattern for sequences (ProjektSekvence, AkceSekvence) — a correct solution for concurrency
